details.IncidentDetail: "[9] LL WITH DOUGLAS SO TO INQ IF THEY ARE ACTUALLY TAKING 10851 1110 ON THIS VEH - EITHER WAY IT IS A TC FOR CHP"

"[1] PARTY STATED HE REPORTED A VEH 10851 TO DOUGLAS CO AND HE FOUND IT WRECKED AT THE ABOVE 1020"
